description_long: This is a large, ornate public monument featuring a central standing male figure atop a multi-tiered stone pedestal. Surrounding the base are three seated allegorical figures, each holding symbolic objects such as a laurel wreath and a staff, suggesting themes of victory, wisdom, or governance. The sculpture is cast in a greenish patinated metal, likely bronze, and rests on a broad, octagonal stone platform with several steps leading up to the base. The central figure is dressed in period attire, possibly 19th-century, and gazes outward with a dignified posture. The monument is detailed with reliefs and inscriptions on the pedestal, though the text is not legible in the images. The entire structure is designed to be a focal point in a public space, inviting viewers to walk around and observe from multiple angles.
description: A grand bronze monument with a central standing male figure and three seated allegorical figures on a multi-tiered stone base. The sculpture features detailed period attire and symbolic objects, set atop an octagonal stepped platform.
description_view_0: The front view shows the central standing figure facing forward, with two seated allegorical figures clearly visible on either side of the pedestal.
description_view_1: The rear view displays the back of the central figure and the backs of the seated figures, with less detail visible on their faces and objects.
description_view_2: This side view highlights the profile of the central figure and provides a clear look at the allegorical figure holding a laurel wreath.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the central figure from another profile, with the allegorical figure holding a staff prominently displayed.
attribute_subject_matter: standing male figure with allegorical seated figures
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is installed outdoors on a paved, stepped platform, likely in a public plaza or park.
